# robots.txt for clawtrak.com
# Generated by ClawTrak (clawtrak.com) on 2026-03-14
# Includes AI crawler governance directives
#
# For agent engagement rules, see: https://clawtrak.com/AGENTS.md
# For LLM context, see: https://clawtrak.com/llms.txt

# ═══ Standard Search Engines ═══
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /internal
Disallow: /private
Disallow: /api/*

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /internal
Disallow: /private
Disallow: /api/*

# Default for other standard crawlers
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /internal
Disallow: /private
Disallow: /api/*

# ═══ AI Training Crawlers ═══
# Control whether AI companies can use your content for model training.
# This does NOT affect generative search results or AI-powered search.

User-agent: GPTBot
Disallow: /
User-agent: CCBot
Disallow: /
User-agent: Google-Extended
Disallow: /
User-agent: Bytespider
Disallow: /
User-agent: Applebot-Extended
Disallow: /
User-agent: ClaudeBot
Disallow: /
User-agent: Claude-Web
Disallow: /
User-agent: Anthropic
Disallow: /
User-agent: cohere-ai
Disallow: /
User-agent: FacebookBot
Disallow: /

# ═══ AI-Powered Search Engines ═══
# These crawlers power generative search (Perplexity, SearchGPT, etc.).
# Blocking them means your business won't appear in AI search results.

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /internal
Disallow: /private
Disallow: /api/*
User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /internal
Disallow: /private
Disallow: /api/*
User-agent: OAI-SearchBot
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /internal
Disallow: /private
Disallow: /api/*

# ═══ Machine-Readable Resources ═══
# Always accessible to all agents

User-agent: *
Allow: /llms.txt
Allow: /AGENTS.md
Allow: /.well-known/agent
Allow: /robots.txt

# ═══ Crawl Rate ═══
Crawl-delay: 1

Sitemap: https://clawtrak.com/sitemap.xml

# ═══ End of robots.txt ═══
# For full agent governance: https://clawtrak.com/AGENTS.md
